summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations planned. Closed candidates are kept closed, security-sensitive candidates are quarantined with route_security, hydrated open PRs are kept for maintainer/single-PR follow-up, and candidates missing hydrated preflight state are blocked as needs_human because target_updated_at is unavailable.
